perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman appears with a thick white cream mask covering her face, holding a bowl containing blue powder and a spatula, speaking directly to the camera. (2) She holds up a grey flat mat and compares it to the powder in her bowl, then stirs the powder which creates a small dust cloud. (3) She presents a black product pouch and two pump bottles labeled 'Oable'. (4) She demonstrates the mixing process, pumping liquid from the bottles into a bowl and stirring it into a thick cream. (5) She applies the cream mask to her face over the existing layer. (6) She touches her bare cheek to show skin texture and then peels a large piece of the dried mask off her face easily. (7) She displays a set of promotional graphics showing prices and a gift bowl set.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and energetic female vocals start immediately, speaking in Mandarin Chinese over upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background music. (2) Sound of powder scraping against a bowl is heard briefly as she speaks. (3) The music continues at a steady pace as the speaker's tone becomes more persuasive and explanatory. (4) Mechanical clicking sounds of a pump bottle being used are audible. (5) The sound of the mask being peeled from the skin (a soft tearing/plastic sound) is heard towards the end. (6) The video ends with a final call to action in a cheery tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '⚠️台灣人不知道的軟膜的真相' (Truth about soft masks Taiwanese don't know) - Hook/Warning. (2) Decorative Text: '這種粉狀軟膜' (This kind of powder mask) - Descriptive. (3) Decorative Text: '矽藻土地墊用在臉上' (Diatomaceous earth mat used on the face) - Humorous comparison. (4) Functional Text: '沒什麼高級保養成分!' (No high-end skincare ingredients!) - Emphasis. (5) Hook Text: '現在🇰🇷韓國女生都在用 奶霜軟膜' (Now Korean girls use cream soft masks) - Trend alert. (6) Functional Text: 'Oable AB軟膜', '不用加水', '20次' - Product details. (7) Effect Text: '超Q彈', '透亮' - Result description. (8) CTA Text: '爭取到台灣最低價💖', '我的IG主頁裡面連結' - Promotional offer and instructions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Product Introduction -> Practical Demo -> Result Showcase -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a light-colored top, often seen with a white facial mask applied.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with some shelves, boxes, and warm lighting visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem Hook -> Comparison -> Product Solution -> Benefit List -> Results -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell the 'Oable AB Cream Mask' by contrasting it with the perceived flaws of traditional powder masks (messiness, lack of nutrients). The video leverages a 'group buy' incentive to drive immediate sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator demonstrates the product in detail, mentions a specific 'lowest price in Taiwan' offer, and directs viewers to a link in her bio.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy fast-talking review style with consistent text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical influencer marketing content optimized for short-form video platforms, focusing on visual proof and price incentives.
